module.name: label
module.description: An outlined tag/label. The text is the block body (spaces / commas / inline Markdown allowed). Renders inline.
module.aiSpec: A small pill-shaped tag/badge (e.g. New, Beta, v2.0). The body text is the label content; it may contain spaces, commas and inline Markdown. Renders inline despite being a block module, so it flows within a heading or sentence. Set `color` to tint the text and outline.

snippet.label: Label
snippet.description: Outlined tag with transparent background. Body = the label text.
